evidence_already_present.scenario_consistency: A-016 requires EV/HP/PV 2035 source-year, planning-year, scenario-label, and scaling/adoption branch consistency before integrated use.
evidence_already_present.weather_contract: WEATHER-001 requires common HP/PV member identity, shared_weather_driver_id, source/provenance, and UTC/local calendar.

future_executable_handoff_if_pi_signs.still_not_enough_for_integrated_use: Annual value-binding approval does not by itself sign A-016 scenario-source consistency, D-004 paired-weather acceptance, or cold-spell tolerances.

non_claims: No annual HP TWh values are executable.
No 2035 HP adoption/electrification value is signed.
No A-016 scenario-source consistency approval for HP integrated use is signed.
No D-004 paired-weather or cold-spell acceptance is signed or run.
No net-load, event, P(E), threshold, capacity-screen, manuscript, or probability analysis is run.

pi_approval_request.requested_decision: Approve or amend use of PBL Referentie_2030 as the value column.
Approve or amend use of PBL I11_woningequivalenten [Woning] as the denominator.
Approve or amend GJ/year divided by 3,600,000 to obtain TWh/year.
Approve or amend CBS 85035NED count-share allocation for SFH/MFH.
Provide or approve a 2035 HP service/adoption/electrification scenario for space and DHW.
Record an explicit A-016 scenario-source consistency approval for the integrated EV/HP/PV 2035 case.
Approve later paired HP/PV evidence using exact WEATHER-001 identity/calendar equality.
Approve later numerical coldest-window and near-freezing cold-spell tolerances before the real check.

status: proposed executable-value-binding decision packet; approval template only
